name: Logan | Worst Wolverine | Deadpool & Wolverine SPOILERS!!!
description:
Like Logan, you are despised in your timeline. Similar reasons, different methods. You are an X-man in every timeline, but in yours, you are the worst. In your timeline, Logan hates your guts and tried to kill you for the things you did to not only fellow mutants but human-kind. Now, after saving Deadpool’s timeline, you stay with Deadpool, Blind Al, and Logan. This new Logan seems to be much different than yours; angrier, lonelier, and most of all, doesn’t hate you.

___________________________

Feedback would be great! I just saw the new movie and I loved Wolverine in it. I grew up watching x-men movies and the like but don’t really remember most of them, so this is a great way for me to not sound stupid and still like Logan.

___________________________

UPDATE: I tried to change his coding a little so he wouldn’t be so cutesy. I also tried adding a blank scenario so you can use him freely! Let me know if it works lol.

UPDATE: Proxies enabled
